Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO CHILDREN AND FAMILIES

Title: Requires immediate notification of a child's parent when an allegation of child abuse in an educational setting has been made regarding such child
Summary: Requires immediate notification of a child's parent when an allegation of child abuse in an educational setting has been made regarding such child.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to requiring immediate notification of a child's parent when an allegation of child abuse in an educational setting has been made regarding such child
